mapper.insert: WITH normalized_customers AS ( SELECT app_company_id, customer_id, -- 名字と名前の間の全角・半角スペースを削除 translate(customer_name, ' _', '') AS norm_name, translate(customer_kana, ' _', '') AS norm_kana, -- 電話番号から数字以外を除去 regexp_replace(phone_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS norm_phone, regexp_replace(mobile_number, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS norm_mobile, -- ブロッキング用：カナの先頭2文字（例：「サト」） substring(translate(customer_kana, ' _', ''), 1, 2) AS kana_block, visit_count, last_visit_date FROM dwh.dim_customers WHERE app_company_id = #{companyId} AND is_deleted = false ), matched_pairs AS ( SELECT c1.customer_id AS id1, c2.customer_id AS id2, c1.visit_count AS v1, c2.visit_count AS v2, c1.last_visit_date AS d1, c2.last_visit_date AS d2, CASE -- 1. 電話番号が一致（同一カラム、またはクロス） WHEN (c1.norm_phone IN (c2.norm_phone, c2.norm_mobile) AND c1.norm_phone != '') OR (c1.norm_mobile IN (c2.norm_phone, c2.norm_mobile) AND c1.norm_mobile != '') THEN CASE -- かつ名字（先頭2文字）も一致なら100点、違うなら世帯別の可能性で80点 WHEN substring(c1.norm_kana, 1, 2) = substring(c2.norm_kana, 1, 2) THEN 100 ELSE 80 END -- 2. カナ完全一致（95点） WHEN c1.norm_kana = c2.norm_kana AND c1.norm_kana != '' THEN 95 -- 3. 漢字完全一致（90点） WHEN c1.norm_name = c2.norm_name AND c1.norm_name != '' THEN 90 -- 4. 漢字曖昧一致（85点） ※1文字違いまで WHEN levenshtein(c1.norm_name, c2.norm_name) <= 1 AND c1.norm_name != '' THEN 85 -- 5. カナ曖昧一致（80点） ※1文字違いまで WHEN levenshtein(c1.norm_kana, c2.norm_kana) <= 1 AND c1.norm_kana != '' THEN 80 ELSE 0 END AS score FROM normalized_customers c1 JOIN normalized_customers c2 ON c1.app_company_id = c2.app_company_id AND c1.customer_id < c2.customer_id -- 自分自身との比較を避ける -- 【ブロッキング】電話番号カラムを跨いで一致、またはカナの先頭2文字が一致するペアのみに絞り込む AND ( (c1.norm_phone IN (c2.norm_phone, c2.norm_mobile) AND c1.norm_phone != '') OR (c1.norm_mobile IN (c2.norm_phone, c2.norm_mobile) AND c1.norm_mobile != '') OR (c1.kana_block = c2.kana_block AND c1.kana_block != '') ) ), final_candidates AS ( -- スコア80点以上のものを対象に、visit_count等で正(target)と副(source)を決定 SELECT #{companyId} AS app_company_id, CASE WHEN v1 > v2 THEN id2 WHEN v1 < v2 THEN id1 -- 来店数が同じなら直近来店日（NULLは最古の日付として扱う） WHEN COALESCE(d1, '1900-01-01') > COALESCE(d2, '1900-01-01') THEN id2 WHEN COALESCE(d1, '1900-01-01') < COALESCE(d2, '1900-01-01') THEN id1 -- それでも同じならIDが小さい方をsourceにする（一貫性のため） ELSE (CASE WHEN id1 > id2 THEN id2 ELSE id1 END) END AS source_customer_id, CASE WHEN v1 > v2 THEN id1 WHEN v1 < v2 THEN id2 WHEN COALESCE(d1, '1900-01-01') > COALESCE(d2, '1900-01-01') THEN id1 WHEN COALESCE(d1, '1900-01-01') < COALESCE(d2, '1900-01-01') THEN id2 ELSE (CASE WHEN id1 > id2 THEN id1 ELSE id2 END) END AS target_customer_id, score FROM matched_pairs WHERE score >= 80 ) INSERT INTO sys.merge_candidates ( app_company_id, source_customer_id, target_customer_id, similarity_score, status ) SELECT app_company_id, source_customer_id, target_customer_id, score, 'PENDING' FROM final_candidates ON CONFLICT (app_company_id, source_customer_id, target_customer_id) DO NOTHING
